tests.name: Backend Health Check
tests.description: GET /api/health returns status ok and database connected
steps: Verify response contains status: ok and database: connected

tests.name: Backend Get Tools
tests.description: GET /api/tools returns list of tracked AI coding tools
steps: Run init-tools command to seed tools
Verify response contains claude-code, codex, gemini-cli, opencode tools

tests.name: Backend Sync Releases
tests.description: Sync command fetches releases from GitHub and stores in database
steps: Run seed command to fetch initial releases
Verify entries are returned with tool info

tests.name: Backend Get Entries
tests.description: GET /api/entries returns paginated release entries
steps: Verify response contains entries array with hasMore field
Verify each entry has id, tool_slug, version, title, published_at

tests.name: Backend Get Single Entry
tests.description: GET /api/entries/:id returns full entry details
steps: Verify response contains full entry with body_md field

tests.name: Backend Get Tool Entries
tests.description: GET /api/tools/:slug/entries returns entries for specific tool
steps: Verify response contains tool info and entries array

tests.name: Backend Search
tests.description: GET /api/search?q=query returns matching entries
steps: Verify response contains entries matching the query

tests.name: Backend RSS All
tests.description: GET /rss/all returns valid RSS feed for all releases
steps: Verify response is valid XML with RSS structure
Verify entries are included as items

tests.name: Backend RSS Tool
tests.description: GET /rss/:slug returns valid RSS feed for specific tool
steps: Verify response is valid XML with RSS structure for the tool

tests.name: Frontend Home Page
tests.description: Home page displays release feed with tool filter
steps: Verify tool filter tabs are visible

tests.name: Frontend Tool Filter
tests.description: Tool filter on home page filters entries by tool
steps: Click on a tool filter tab
Verify URL updates with tool parameter
Verify only entries for that tool are displayed

tests.name: Frontend Entry Detail
tests.description: Entry detail page shows full release information
steps: Click on a release card from home page
Verify tool badge and version are displayed

tests.name: Frontend Tool Page
tests.description: Tool page shows tool-specific release history
steps: Verify tool name and repository link are displayed
Verify list of releases for that tool

tests.name: Frontend Search
tests.description: Search functionality works correctly
steps: Enter search query in search input
Verify search results page shows matching entries
Verify query is displayed in results

tests.name: Frontend Pagination
tests.description: Pagination works for release feed
steps: Scroll to bottom of home page or click load more

tests.name: Frontend RSS Links
tests.description: RSS links are accessible from header and tool pages
steps: Verify RSS link in header links to /rss/all
Verify tool-specific RSS link points to correct URL

tests.name: Frontend Responsive Design
tests.description: Application is responsive on mobile devices

tests.name: Frontend Loading States
tests.description: Loading states display correctly
steps: Navigate to home page with slow network
Verify loading skeleton or spinner displays

tests.name: Frontend Error Handling
tests.description: Error states display correctly

tests.name: Full E2E Flow
tests.description: Complete user flow from browsing to reading release
